title: hymenophyllum eboracense
intro: Hymenophyllum eboracense, also known as the Yorkshire fern, is a species of fern that is native to the United Kingdom. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum eboracense include the potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in salves and ointments for topical application.
